codeReview.summary: AiReviewGate implementation is correct. The gate reads changed files, builds a review prompt, calls the LLM backend (when configured), parses JSON responses into structured results with confidence scoring, and converts findings to ValidationMessages. All 14 unit tests pass. The implementation includes proper stub mode handling when no LLM backend is configured.

summary: Review PASS - AiReviewGate implementation is complete and correct. The gate properly handles AI-powered code review with confidence scoring, supports stub mode when no LLM is configured, and has comprehensive unit test coverage (14 tests). The feature fulfills its description of providing 'AiReviewGate with Evaluator agent for AI-powered code review. Confidence scoring.'
